content:
About DungeonPath Welcome to DungeonPath, your go-to source for detailed, up-to-date guides on Roblox dungeons, survival games, and trending multiplayer experiences.
What We Do We write comprehensive, step-by-step guides that help players:
Get started quickly with beginner-friendly walkthroughs Find answers fast with structured tables and data Stay up to date with guides that reflect the latest game updates Master the game with pro tips and advanced strategies Our Approach Unlike generic AI-generated content, every guide on DungeonPath is:
Researched from official wikis, community forums, and player discussions Verified by actually playing the games Updated when game versions change — you’ll see the last updated date on every article Written for casual players, not hardcore gamers Why “DungeonPath”? The name comes from the idea of finding your way through the dungeon — whether it’s literally navigating the Hadal Blacksite in Pressure, or figuring out the best fishing spots in Fisch. We’re here to light the path.
Contact GitHub: liujun418/dungeonpath Email: contact@dungeonpath.com Last updated: May 9, 2026

content:
Last updated: May 9, 2026
1. What is Fisch? Fisch is a popular Roblox fishing simulation game where you catch fish, upgrade your gear, and explore different fishing locations. It’s free to play and combines relaxing fishing mechanics with progression-based goals.
Why play Fisch?
Chill gameplay perfect for casual players Deep progression system with dozens of fish to discover Regular updates with new content Social: trade and compete with other players 2. Getting Started Step 1: Join the Game Search for “Fisch” on Roblox and join. You’ll spawn on the starting dock with a basic rod.
Step 2: Your First Catch Click/Tap the water near the dock Wait for a bite (you’ll see a visual indicator) Click/Tap again to reel in You’ll earn coins from your catch Step 3: Upgrade Your Rod Your starter rod is basic. Visit the Rod Shop near the dock to upgrade. Better rods let you:
Catch rarer fish Reel in faster Fish in deeper waters 3. Beginner Tips Tip Why It Matters Start at Moosewood Easiest location for beginners Save coins for rod upgrades Don’t spend on cosmetics early Check the weather Some fish only appear in certain conditions Talk to NPCs They give quests that reward extra coins 4. Basic Rod Comparison Rod Cost Best For Notes Starter Rod Free Learning the game Replace ASAP Flimsy Rod 200 coins Early game Good first upgrade Steady Rod 500 coins Mid-game Solid all-rounder 5. FAQ Q: Is Fisch free to play? A: Yes, completely free on Roblox.
Q: What’s the best first upgrade? A: Save your coins for a better rod. It makes everything easier.
Q: How do I find rare fish? A: Upgrade your rod and explore new locations. Check our Fisch Best Rods Tier List and Fisch Fish Location Map for detailed guides.
6. Next Steps Now that you know the basics:
Check our Best Rods Tier List to plan your upgrades Explore our Fish Location Map to find rare catches Try the Pressure Beginner Guide for a different Roblox experience

content:
Last updated: May 9, 2026
1. What is Pressure? Pressure is a horror-survival game on Roblox set in the Hadal Blacksite, an underwater research facility. You navigate through dark corridors, avoid terrifying creatures, and try to survive as long as possible.
Why play Pressure?
Intense horror experience with genuinely scary moments Deep lore and story hidden throughout the facility Regular updates (latest: “Half A Slice Of Cake” - March 2026) Great for fans of Doors looking for something new 2. Getting Started Step 1: Understand the Goal Your objective is simple: survive and progress through the facility. Each door you open leads to deeper, more dangerous areas.
Step 2: Learn the Controls WASD or Joystick: Move Mouse/Touch: Look around and interact Shift: Sprint (use wisely — stamina is limited) E: Interact with objects Step 3: The First Few Doors Don’t rush. The early doors are your tutorial:
Learn to listen for creature sounds Hide in lockers when you hear danger approaching Pick up key items when you see them 3. Survival Tips Tip Why It Matters Listen carefully Most creatures give audio cues before appearing Don’t sprint unnecessarily Stamina is limited and you need it for escapes Memorize locker locations Your safe spots save your life Play with friends Co-op is easier and more fun Check for updates New content changes strategies 4. Monster Overview Monster Danger Level How to Survive Ambush High Hide immediately when lights flicker Rush Medium Get to a hiding spot ASAP Snare Medium Watch for traps on the floor Note: Pressure received a massive update in March 2026 (“Half A Slice Of Cake”) adding 200+ item skins, 260+ charms, and 50+ modifiers. This guide reflects the post-update game.
5. FAQ Q: Is Pressure free to play? A: Yes, free on Roblox.
Q: Is it too scary for younger players? A: Pressure is genuinely scary. It’s rated for older Roblox players. Parents should be aware.
Q: Can I play solo or should I team up? A: Both work. Solo is more intense, co-op is more forgiving.
Q: How is Pressure different from Doors? A: Similar concept, but Pressure has its own unique monsters, atmosphere, and progression system. Think of it as a spiritual successor with its own identity.
6. Next Steps Check our Pressure Monsters Dex for the complete creature guide Try the Fisch Beginner Guide for a completely different Roblox experience
